logs

01.feb.25 this game has consumed everyone i've ever loved. i bought it for my switch (balatro on the bed, balatro on the toilet, balatro on the train, etc.) around when i finished fallout new vegas' dead money dlc (i was getting a bit burned ngl) and Oh My God. this game is so addictive it's actually a little bit scary but SO FUN. highest ante i've gotten has been 12. also love the yuri fanart of the jokers please keep it coming. my favorite joker design is probably dusk. everything about the game is so charming.

screenshots

soon. i hate transferring screenshots from the switch since i cant mass upload them to twitter and i hate taking out my micro sd card </3

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
